title: Monitor Console: Vocal Insert, Stereo IEM, and 3-Way PA
brief: Patch vocal input, keyboard stereo DI, insert compression, stereo IEM, and crossover-fed amplifier inputs.
processorLabel: MONITOR CONSOLE: VOCAL INSERT, STEREO IEM, AND 3-WAY PA

puzzle.scenario: You are completing an advanced monitor-console patch with vocal and keyboard stage inputs, a vocal insert loop, a stereo IEM feed, and a multi-way PA system.
puzzle.objective: Patch the vocal and keyboard inputs, complete the Channel 1 insert compressor loop, route the stereo IEM feed, and keep the main PA crossover and amplifier chain in correct left/right order.

constraints.text: Insert, monitor, and PA-processing routes belong to different subsystems and should not be collapsed into one cable-matching task.

puzzle.completionExplanation: The completed patch lands the vocal and keyboard sources on the stagebox, completes the vocal compressor insert loop, feeds the stereo IEM transmitter from Aux 1 L/R, and routes Main L/R through the crossover to the matching high, mid, and low amplifier inputs.

educationalFeedback.defaultWrongRoute: This board accepts wrong liv023-* attempts as non-completing invalid routes for feedback, but only the required route list counts toward completion.

stereoGroups.purpose: Keyboard stereo DI lands on stagebox inputs 2 and 3.
Aux 1 L/R feeds IEM Transmitter A as a stereo monitor mix.
Main L/R feeds the 3-way crossover inputs.
Crossover high-band L/R feeds the high amplifier inputs.
Crossover mid-band L/R feeds the mid amplifier inputs.
Crossover low-band L/R feeds the low amplifier inputs.

broadInvalidRouteRule.rule: For LIV-023, any two distinct keys starting with liv023- are allowed to draw an invalid route when they are not a valid required route.

notes: False/trap behavior is renderer-specific today and is not represented as canonical puzzle trapRoutes.
Future manifest conversion must preserve broad invalid-route red-cable behavior without treating false hitboxes as valid completion endpoints.

falseHitboxBehavior.invalidRouteRendering: False hitboxes participate in broad LIV-023 invalid-route rendering but do not count toward completion.

forbiddenText: Drum Fill Plus Sidefill Plus Vocal Wedge
